raw_consumer_statement: In interstate felonious organized criminal activity, Citi Bank is fraudulently charging me for a charge I did not make because my credit card was stolen. They simply decided I must be a subhuman of the wrong race - and thus I deserve to be criminally stolen from. This is so despicably sick and disgusting. I have a police report documenting my credit card was stolen by criminal actors. However, Citi Bank is now dabbling into criminal wire fraud because they think this makes more money now.
